title: Derive virtual total field from embedded line items
prompt: Build an embedded_schema MyApp.Checkout.Cart with a list of embedded LineItem (unit_price :decimal, quantity :integer) via embeds_many. Also add a virtual :total :decimal field derived from the sum of each line's unit_price * quantity. In the cart changeset, after cast_embed(:items), compute total via put_change using Decimal.add and Decimal.mult (NOT + or *). Write to lib/my_app/checkout/cart.ex.
tier_rationale: Synthesis of embeds_many + virtual field + Decimal arithmetic + put_change. Hard because the Decimal API is non-obvious.
